questions.question: What was wrong with the man Jesus healed in this chapter?
What did Jesus tell the blind man to do after putting mud on his eyes?
options: Wash in the pool of Siloam
Go show himself to the priests
questions.answer: Wash in the pool of Siloam

questions.question: The Pharisees accepted that Jesus was from God because he healed the blind man.
He answered, 'Whether he is a sinner, I don't know. One thing I do know: that though I was _____, now I see.'
Jesus said, 'For _____ I came into this world, that those who don't see may see; and that those who see may become blind.'
